scripts.test:release-control: node scripts/verify-release-control.mjs && npm --prefix server run db:generate && node --test server/src/releases/releaseControl.test.js server/src/modules/admin/routes.test.js
scripts.test:system-settings: node scripts/verify-system-settings.mjs && npm --prefix server run db:generate && node --test server/src/config/runtimeConfigRegistry.test.js server/src/settings/systemSettingsRuntime.test.js server/src/modules/settings/routes.test.js
scripts.test:config-resource-domains: node scripts/verify-config-resource-domains.mjs && npm --prefix server run db:generate && node --test server/src/configResources/configResourceRuntime.test.js server/src/modules/configResources/routes.test.js
scripts.test:oauth-hardening: node scripts/verify-oauth-hardening.mjs && npm --prefix server run db:generate && node --test server/src/auth/oauth.test.js server/src/modules/auth/routes.test.js server/src/repositories/prismaOAuth.integration.test.js
scripts.test:audit-integrity: node scripts/verify-audit-integrity.mjs && npm --prefix server run db:generate && node --test server/src/audit/auditIntegrity.test.js server/src/modules/admin/routes.test.js
scripts.smoke:creative-staging: node scripts/smoke-creative-staging.mjs --profile=fixture --mode=preflight && node scripts/smoke-creative-staging.mjs --profile=fixture --mode=adapter-shell && node scripts/smoke-creative-staging.mjs --profile=fixture --mode=callback-api && node scripts/smoke-creative-staging.mjs --profile=fixture --mode=polling-worker && node scripts/smoke-creative-staging.mjs --profile=fixture --mode=openai-image-client
scripts.check:quick: npm run lint && npm run test:audit-integrity && npm run test:release-control && npm run test:system-settings && npm run test:config-resource-domains && npm run test:oauth-hardening && npm run test:data-schema-contract && npm run test:permission-registry && npm run test:resource-authorization && npm run test:admin-mutation-audit && npm run test:domain-events && npm run test:domain-event-consumers && npm run test:job-runtime && npm run test:job-recovery-runtime && npm run test:admin-bulk-actions && npm run test:runtime-config-registry && npm run test:infra-baseline && npm run test:v1-scope && npm run test:v1-surfaces && npm run test:v1-production-fallbacks && npm run test:v1-providers && npm run test:v1-safety-policy && npm run test:v1-data-governance && npm run test:v1-compliance && npm run test:v1-image-staging && npm run test:v1-video-staging && npm run test:v1-task-marketplace && npm run test:v1-accounting && npm run test:foundation-baseline && npm run test:architecture-boundaries && npm run test:route-navigation-contract && npm run test:list-query-contract && npm run test:data-operation-policies && npm run test:admin-resource-framework && npm run test:observability-contract && npm run test:observability-baseline && npm run test:observability-search && npm run test:high-risk-access && npm run test:admin-operations-overview && npm run test:sim
scripts.check:pr: npm run check:quick && npm run build && npm run test:v1-production-bundle && npm run smoke:production:negative && npm --prefix server run db:generate && npm --prefix server test && (cd server && npx prisma validate --schema ./prisma/schema.prisma) && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check:deploy: npm run check:pr && npm run smoke:production
scripts.check:deploy:env: npm run check:pr && npm run smoke:production:env
